name: Diabetic Oatmeal Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, lite salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. Cream the corn oil, peanut butter, eggbeaters, egg, skim milk, liquid sweetener, and sugar substitute in a bowl until well combined.
3. Gradually add the oatmeal to the mixture and stir until it forms a cohesive dough.
4. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Press down each ball with a glass.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes. Each cookie contains approximately 35 calories.
